name: AppLocalizations
desc:
Callers can lookup localized strings with an instance of AppLocalizations
returned by AppLocalizations.of(context).

name: localizationsDelegates
desc:
A list of this localizations delegate along with the default localizations
delegates.

name: supportedLocales
desc: A list of this localizations delegate's supported locales.

name: validateIp
desc: Validates an IPv4 address. Returns a localized error message or null.

name: validatePort
desc: Validates a port string. Returns a localized error message or null.
